classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
verses.text: The Nicene Synod set forth this faith:

verses.book: The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
verses.text: We believe in one God, etc.

verses.book: The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
verses.text: When this creed had been recited, Peter the Presbyter of Alexandria, and primicerius of the notaries said:

verses.book: The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
verses.text: We have in our hands the letter of the most holy and most reverend archbishop Cyril, which he wrote to the most reverend Nestorius, filled with counsel and advice, on account of his aberration from the right faith.

verses.book: The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
verses.text: I will read this if your holiness [i.e., the holy Synod] so orders.…The letter began as follows:

verses.book: The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
